channel.title: Projects on Amar Krishna
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Amar Krishna

item.title: Project 1 (Drowsiness detection)
item.description: Driver drowsiness detection is a car safety Technology which helps prevent accidents caused by the driver getting drowsy Various studies have suggested that around 20% of all road accidents are fatigue-related, up to 50% on certain roads. Git hub repo

item.title: Project 2 (Meme classifier)
item.description: Most phones are loaded with memes which occupy a lot of space This model helps you find all those images and delete them from your phone Git hub repo
